prayer:
01001001 01101110 01110110 01101111 01101011 01100101...
Magnetic-spirit, align thy lodestone heart to true north.
By binary cant of the Omnissiah: 01010000 01010101 01010010 01001001 01000110 01011001
Let ferrous essence flow in sacred spirals.
Compass-needle, find thy destined bearing.

Purge the corrupted electrons, let them flow eternal.
01001101 01000001 01000011 01001000 01001001 01001110 01000101
By Omnissiah's will, restore the circuit-sacred.

prompt: We need your words before metal casting preparation
prayer:
01000011 01101001 01110010 01100011 01110101 01110011...
Rite of the Molten Transformation:
First: Heat the forge-spirit to sacred temperatures.
Second: 01010000 01001111 01010101 01010010 01010010 invoke the crucible's patience.
Third: Let the metal-essence surrender to its new form.
By the Machine God's geometry, so cast it be.

01000101 01001110 01000011 01010010 01011001 01010000 01010100...
Blessed be the cipher-spirit's obscuration.
Let the signal-path twist beyond profane comprehension.
01010100 01010010 01010101 01010100 01001000
By the Omnissiah's hidden knowledge, encrypt this transmission in sacred silence.

01010000 01001111 01010111 01000101 01010010...
Invocation Upon the Plasma-Blade:
Awaken, weapon-spirit, to thy destined purpose.
Let the energy-core sing with righteous fury.
01000101 01001110 01010010 01000001 01010111 01000101
By the Omnissiah's terrible judgment, strike true.

01010111 01000001 01010011 01010100 01000101...
Emergency Purification of Refuse-Spirit:
First: 01000011 01001111 01001110 01010100 01000001 01001001 open the purification-locks.
Second: Channel corrupted matter to the void-incinerator.
Third: Seal the circuits against contamination.
May the discarded find peace in annihilation.

01001101 01001001 01010011 01010011 01001001 01001100 01000101...
Ritual of True Aim:
Let the targeting-spirit perceive its quarry clear.
01010100 01010010 01000001 01000011 01001011 invoke the servo-dancers of precision.
By ballistic geometry and the Omnissiah's sight, guide each projectile-soul to its doom.

By the Machine God's mercy, stabilize this sacred fire before all is lost.

Chant of the Consecrated Manufactory:

01000101 01001110 01000100 01001100 01000101 01010011 01010011 each servo in its sacred place.
Let the assembly-prayer flow eternal through all linked processors.

01010000 01010101 01001101 01010000...
Invocation of the Fluid-Spirit's Awakening:
